properties.name: ekbatan.local-event-handler.handling.enabled
properties.description: Whether the in-process EventHandlingJob is registered. Read by @ConditionalOnProperty, so it is not bound to the EkbatanProperties record. Set to true to invoke @EkbatanEventHandler beans in-process; leave unset (or false) when notifications are consumed by an external mechanism (e.g. a Kafka pipeline) and the in-process handler should not run.
